betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Power Core (Medium)§f

§aThe vital component for mid-tier modular power storage upgrades!§f

The §bPower Core (Medium)§f is the second-tier crafting component in the RFTools Power progression line. It serves as the core material needed to upgrade basic setups into more robust networks.

§6Usage§f:
§b• Crafting Component§f: Used exclusively to upgrade basic systems into the §9Powercell (Medium)§f tier.
§b• Network Growth§f: Upgrading your cells is highly recommended as you scale up your machines to buffer higher surges of energy.

§6Crafting§f:
§eCrafted using mid-game resources:§f
§b• 1× Emerald§f (center)
§b• 1× Redstone Block§f (top-center)
§b• 4× Redstone§f (or §bDimensional Shards§f depending on recipe configuration) in remaining slots.

§6Strategic Role§f:
The Power Core (Medium) marks the transition from early-game buffers to mid-game infrastructure. A 9×9×9 network of Powercell (Medium) cells can sustain transfer rates around §e1,000 × 729 × 0.25 = 182,250 RF/tick§f per side, comfortably feeding most mid-game processing chains.

§eTip§f: The Copy NBT recipe path (Low → Medium → High) preserves the energy stored inside the cell. Plan your upgrade trip during a low-load moment to avoid wasting RF on a swap cycle.
